who: restaurant general managers managing 5–15 staff members
offer: For restaurant general managers managing 5–15 staff members, inefficient scheduling causes overstaffing or understaffing. We automate scheduling instead of using manual spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient staff scheduling leading to overstaffing or understaffing
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers discussions on scheduling challenges
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for restaurant management
try_it: Let users try simple drag-and-drop scheduling interface and basic time tracking functionality on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
